docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WALKER, PAULINE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOUGALD, RAFIKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOUGALD, RAFIKI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, PAULINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCDOUGALD, RAFIKI DEFT. PASTEL HAIR SALON DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFT. RAFIKI'S NAME CORRECTED TO RAFIKI, MCDOUGALD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
